items.title: Ukrainian woman named by Interpol as main suspect in Monaco bomb attack
items.summary: Officials in Monaco say they believe she was "disguised as a man" and may not have acted alone.

items.title: Yet More Scrolls Burned by Vesuvius Decoded by AI–Revealing Insights by Unknown Stoic Philosopher
items.summary: More insights into Classical literature have been recovered from the burned papyrus scrolls destroyed in the same eruption that buried Pompeii. They include ruminations on Stoic philosophy by an unkno…
